user_story: As an HR admin, I want to initiate a layoff, so that a group separation can be tracked and approved
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Layoff List screen; When I click Initiate Layoff and enter the details; Then a new layoff is created and appears in the list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter layoffs by status, so that I can track them through approval and exit stages
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Layoff List screen; When I select a status such as Pending approval, Approved, or Exited; Then only matching layoffs are listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter layoffs by period, so that I can review layoffs initiated within a date range
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Layoff List screen; When I set a From and To period; Then only layoffs in that range are shown

user_story: As an approver, I want to act on layoffs pending with me via the Task column, so that I can approve, reject, or withdraw them
acceptance_criteria: Given a layoff has status Pending with me; When I open its Task; Then I can approve, reject, or withdraw the layoff

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to see the number of employees, initiated date, and initiator for each layoff, so that I can assess its scope
acceptance_criteria: Given layoffs are listed; When I view a row; Then I can see the layoff name, initiated date, initiated name, and number of employees
